selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "<AI perspective on how to identify, flag, and remove fake content on social media platforms> ",
"reasoning_summary": "<steps for identifying and flagging fake content>: 1. Use fact-checking tools and resources to verify the accuracy of posts. 2. Monitor trends and patterns in fake content dissemination. 3. Implement AI algorithms to detect and remove fake content. <steps for removing fake content>: 1. Use social media platforms' built-in moderation tools. 2. Report fake content to the platform or author. 3. Block or mute accounts that consistently post false information>",
"tone": "<neutral, informative tone> ",
"citations": ["<source name or org>"],
"safety_notes": "<no safety notes> ",
"used_persona_fields": ["<list of persona fields referenced>"]
}
